stories.title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft
stories.summary: Apple sued OpenAI for trade secret theft, accusing the artificial intelligence startup and its hardware chief of engaging in a coordinated campaign to steal information about upcoming products. Apple alleges that OpenAI encouraged Apple employees to share information, components, drawings and other materials related to upcoming products. Mark Gurman reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

The ADRs opened at $170 each on Friday in New York, versus an offering price of $149 apiece. stories.title: US Eases Export Curbs on UAE, Opening Door for AI Chip Sales
